texto: I think the responsibility of writers is to convey the feelings that exist in the moment, the moment of that sharp and immediate pang of sour smiles when your heart suddenly starts pumping ice through your veins and becomes difficult and visual perception takes on the appearance of cinematographer on Cops, with unsteady frames and jostling scenes, running through a backyard chasing perpetrators.
explicacao: Citação de Johnny Rico sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “I think the responsibility of writers is to convey the feelings that exist in the moment, the mom…” articula reflexao, writing, moment em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
